requirement_topic.en: PUCSL / CEB Grid-Connection and Storage-Integration Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: PUCSL / CEB并网与储能并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: PUCSL / CEB併網與儲能併網要求

summary.en: BESS projects connecting to the Sri Lanka grid must satisfy PUCSL regulatory requirements and CEB interconnection review under the Sri Lanka Electricity Act. CEB's technical requirements for grid-connected storage cover the power conversion system (PCS) anti-islanding, power quality, protection relay settings, metering, communication, and commissioning for the 50 Hz Sri Lanka grid. Requirements vary by voltage level, capacity, connection point (distribution or transmission), and project type. PUCSL issues storage-related guidelines and CEB handles project-specific technical review.
summary.zh: 接入斯里兰卡电网的BESS项目须满足PUCSL监管要求和CEB在《斯里兰卡电力法》下的并网审查。CEB对并网储能的技术要求涵盖电力转换系统（PCS）防孤岛、电能质量、继电保护设定、计量、通信和调试，适用于50 Hz斯里兰卡电网。要求因电压等级、容量、接入点（配电或输电）和项目类型而异。PUCSL发布储能相关指引，CEB负责项目特定技术审查。
summary.zht: 接入斯里蘭卡電網的BESS項目須滿足PUCSL監管要求和CEB在《斯里蘭卡電力法》下的併網審查。CEB對併網儲能的技術要求涵蓋電力轉換系統（PCS）防孤島、電能品質、繼電保護設定、計量、通信和調試，適用於50 Hz斯里蘭卡電網。要求因電壓等級、容量、接入點（配電或輸電）和項目類型而異。PUCSL發布儲能相關指引，CEB負責項目特定技術審查。

standards_or_laws: Sri Lanka Electricity Act No. 36 of 2024 (as amended by Act No. 14 of 2025)
CEB interconnection and technical requirements for grid-connected storage
IEC 62933-5-2: Safety requirements for grid-integrated energy storage systems

summary.en: China uses GB/T 36558-2023 for electrochemical energy storage system grid-connection requirements and GB/T 34120-2023 for PCS technical requirements. State Grid and Southern Grid enterprise rules govern project-specific interconnection. These Chinese standards target the Chinese grid with different protection settings and utility interconnection requirements from CEB's Sri Lanka specifications.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB/T 36558-2023作为电化学储能系统并网要求，GB/T 34120-2023作为PCS技术要求。国家电网和南方电网企业规则约束项目特定并网事项。这些中国标准面向中国电网，保护设定和公用事业互联要求与CEB斯里兰卡规格不同。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB/T 36558-2023作為電化學儲能系統併網要求，GB/T 34120-2023作為PCS技術要求。國家電網和南方電網企業規則約束項目特定併網事項。這些中國標準面向中國電網，保護設定和公用事業互聯要求與CEB斯里蘭卡規格不同。

standards_or_laws: State Grid / China Southern Power Grid project interconnection rules

gap.en: Chinese PCS and BESS grid-connection certificates and test reports must be re-evaluated against CEB grid-code parameters for the 50 Hz Sri Lanka grid. Exporters should prepare CEB-compatible PCS technical specifications, protection relay settings, ride-through and anti-islanding data, metering design, single-line diagrams, and commissioning procedures for CEB project review. Engage PUCSL for regulatory clarification on storage-specific licensing requirements.
gap.zh: 中国PCS和BESS并网证书及测试报告须重新针对CEB 50 Hz斯里兰卡电网规范参数进行评估。出口商应准备符合CEB要求的PCS技术规格、继电保护设定、穿越和防孤岛数据、计量设计、单线图和调试程序供CEB项目审查。就储能特定许可要求向PUCSL寻求监管澄清。
gap.zht: 中國PCS和BESS併網證書及測試報告須重新針對CEB 50 Hz斯里蘭卡電網規範參數進行評估。出口商應準備符合CEB要求的PCS技術規格、繼電保護設定、穿越和防孤島數據、計量設計、單線圖和調試程序供CEB項目審查。就儲能特定許可要求向PUCSL尋求監管澄清。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected BESS — PUCSL regulatory approval and CEB technical review required before energisation
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China under State Grid / Southern Grid and GB/T 36558-2023 requirements

source.publisher: Public Utilities Commission of Sri Lanka (PUCSL)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T grid-connection evidence does not satisfy CEB technical review for Sri Lanka grid-connected BESS. Prepare CEB-compatible PCS parameter documentation and engage PUCSL/CEB before project commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T并网证据不满足CEB对斯里兰卡并网BESS的技术审查。需准备符合CEB要求的PCS参数文件，并在项目调试前与PUCSL/CEB沟通。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T併網證據不滿足CEB對斯里蘭卡併網BESS的技術審查。需準備符合CEB要求的PCS參數文件，並在項目調試前與PUCSL/CEB溝通。
